messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0181",
  "title": "5.涉及国家地区说明 （按照广大大产品地区标注，并不代表实际地理分布）",
  "page_index": 103,
  "page_range": "103-104"
}

Section text:
5.涉及国家地区说明 （按照广大大产品地区标注 ，并不代表实际地理分布 ）
北美：美国、加拿大 、墨西哥 、巴拿马
欧洲：土耳其 、法国、德国、英国、意大利 、西班牙 、荷兰、挪威、波兰、葡萄牙 、比利时 、瑞士、
奥地利 、罗马尼亚 、瑞典、希腊、丹麦、卢森堡 、爱尔兰 、芬兰
日韩：日本、韩国
中国港澳台 ：中国香港 、中国澳门 、中国台湾
东南亚 ：泰国、印度尼西亚 、新加坡 、马来西亚 、越南、菲律宾 、柬埔寨大洋洲 ：澳大利亚 、新西兰
南亚：印度、巴基斯坦
中东：巴林、卡塔尔 、沙特阿拉伯 、阿联酋 、阿塞拜疆 、黎巴嫩 、科威特 、以色列 、阿曼、伊拉克 、
摩洛哥
南美：巴西、智利、阿根廷 、哥伦比亚 、秘鲁、委内瑞拉 、巴拉圭
非洲：埃及、肯尼亚 、尼日利亚 、安哥拉 、南非、阿尔及利亚 、利比亚 、塞内加尔 、科特迪瓦报告制作 ：李磊 &胡小璐 -广大大数据研究院； Singular ；Aarki
设计： 李磊报告说明

message.content:
This section serves as a geographic reference and attribution note, designed to answer the following retrieval questions:
- **Region-to-Country Mappings (Entities/Topics)**: Which specific countries and territories are classified under each of the ten regions (North America, Europe, Japan & Korea, China HK/Macau/Taiwan, Southeast Asia, Oceania, South Asia, Middle East, South America, Africa) used in this report?
- **Classification Definition & Claim**: How are the geographic groupings defined for this document? (Answer: They follow "Guangda" product labeling conventions and explicitly do not represent actual geographic distribution.)
- **Report Credits (Entities)**: Which organizations and individuals are responsible for report production and design? (Answer: Production by Li Lei & Hu Xiaolu of Guangda Data Research Institute, Singular, and Aarki; Design by Li Lei.)
- **Dates, Procedures, Tables, Figures, Metrics**: None are present in this section.
- **Evidence Type**: Functions as a definitional reference list, methodological disclaimer, and production attribution.

This section serves as a geographic reference and attribution note, designed to answer the following retrieval questions:
- **Region-to-Country Mappings (Entities/Topics)**: Which specific countries and territories are classified under each of the ten regions (North America, Europe, Japan & Korea, China HK/Macau/Taiwan, Southeast Asia, Oceania, South Asia, Middle East, South America, Africa) used in this report?
- **Classification Definition & Claim**: How are the geographic groupings defined for this document? (Answer: They follow "Guangda" product labeling conventions and explicitly do not represent actual geographic distribution.)
- **Report Credits (Entities)**: Which organizations and individuals are responsible for report production and design? (Answer: Production by Li Lei & Hu Xiaolu of Guangda Data Research Institute, Singular, and Aarki; Design by Li Lei.)
- **Dates, Procedures, Tables, Figures, Metrics**: None are present in this section.
- **Evidence Type**: Functions as a definitional reference list, methodological disclaimer, and production attribution.
